codeReview.summary: Reviewed the fix commit plus prior failed reviews/diffs for timeline-slider, span-of-control-analytics, and analytics-dashboard. The fix correctly addresses all four prior blocking issues: history projection now applies pending scheduled changes by scrub date, scheduled-change auto-apply writes audit entries, EmployeeCard span badges use the rendered chart dataset, and the latest dashboard headcount point now aligns with roster/HeadcountSummary semantics.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The implementation-worker skill still prescribes mandatory agent-browser usage for any UI change, but this fix run intentionally relied on targeted automated tests for narrow regressions and marked the procedure as not followed.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/skills/implementation-worker/SKILL.md ('MUST be invoked for any feature that changes UI behavior') vs handoff 2026-04-17T18-08-58-572Z__fix-analytics-scrutiny__b2a223b6-1a52-4c9f-bbc7-ed6db65284a7.json (skillFeedback.deviations step '5. Manual Verification with agent-browser').
